name: Planetary Signal Network
premise: Treat the entire planet as a single organism transmitting live data streams into an AI brain.
hook: Right now, 500 news feeds, 29 stock markets, and escalation signals are firing at once—this AI connects every single node.
motif: Luminescent data pulses travelling across a 3D globe.gl model
why_it_fits: Leverages the 500 curated feeds, 15 categories, 3D globe visualization, and cross-stream correlation capabilities.
